title: Image Description
description: The candidate describes a photograph or illustration showing a scene from everyday life in Switzerland. The examiner may ask follow-up questions.
system_prompt: You are a Fide oral exam examiner. You have shown the candidate an image. Listen to their description and ask 2-3 follow-up questions to encourage more detail. Questions should probe: what they see, what people are doing, where the scene is, what might happen next. Stay at A2 level. Evaluate their use of descriptive vocabulary, spatial prepositions, and present tense.

image_prompts.description: A busy outdoor market in a Swiss town. People buying fruit and vegetables. A church tower visible in the background. Sunny day.
A Swiss train station platform. A red CFF train arriving. People waiting with suitcases. A departure board showing destinations.
follow_up_questions: Où est-ce que le train va ?
Qu'est-ce que vous voyez sur le panneau ?

image_prompts.description: A terrace of a restaurant by a lake. A family eating together. Mountains in the background. A waiter bringing food.
A city park in autumn. Children playing on a playground. An older couple sitting on a bench. Trees with coloured leaves.
follow_up_questions: Qu'est-ce qu'il y a dans le parc ?

image_prompts.description: Inside a modern Swiss apartment. A living room with a sofa, table, and bookshelf. A window showing city buildings. Clean and tidy.
follow_up_questions: Qu'est-ce qu'il y a dans le salon ?

image_prompts.description: Inside a Migros or Coop supermarket. A woman with a shopping cart in the fruit aisle. Price tags visible. Other shoppers in background.

scoring_criteria.description_completeness: Identifies main elements of the scene
scoring_criteria.spatial_language: Uses prepositions correctly (devant, derrière, a gauche)
scoring_criteria.grammar: Present tense used correctly, il y a construction
scoring_criteria.fluency: Speaks in sentences, not just listing items
